Start Sequence Sale Ends Tomorrow!

There's now less than 24 hours to get rewards for purchasing CSS Land/Habs and Claim Stakes! The cutoff time to be eligible for rewards is 12:00 PM EST / 5:00 PM UTC

Reminder: These perks are only for PRIMARY MARKET buyers. Make sure you're purchasing from a blue Star Atlas listing.

  | https://play.staratlas.com/market/?category=structure
